description: Creates a point at a ratio along a shape or between two points. Supports static (single ratio) and animated (from/to ratio) forms.
utility: Find a point at a ratio along a shape, or between two points

arguments.name: shape or P1
arguments.description: Shape to interpolate along, or first point for point-to-point form

arguments.name: ratio or P2
arguments.description: Ratio for shape form (0=start, 1=end), or second point for point-to-point form

arguments.name: ratio / toRatio
arguments.description: For point-to-point: the ratio (0=P1, 1=P2, 0.5=midpoint). For animated shape form: the toRatio

arguments.name: toRatio
arguments.description: For animated point-to-point: the ending ratio (creates animation from fromRatio to toRatio)

alternates.description: Point at ratio along line, circle, ellipse, polygon, plot, arc, etc. (0=start, 1=end)
Point animates from fromRatio to toRatio along shape
Point at ratio between P1 and P2 (0=P1, 0.5=midpoint, 1=P2)
Point animates from fromRatio to toRatio along segment P1→P2

examples.expression: A = point(G, 2, 1); B = point(G, 6, 5); M = interpolate(G, A, B, 0.5)

examples.scenario: Point at 1/3 ratio between two points (e.g. centroid helper)
examples.expression: M = interpolate(G, A, B, 0.5); centroid = interpolate(G, M, V, 1/3)

examples.scenario: Animate point traveling along a line segment between two points
examples.expression: A = point(G, 1, 1); B = point(G, 5, 4); P = interpolate(G, A, B, 0, 1)

examples.scenario: Animate point along a circle circumference
examples.expression: circle_1 = circle(G, point(G, 0, 0), radius(3)); P = interpolate(G, circle_1, 0, 1)

examples.scenario: Static point at ratio along a plot curve
examples.expression: plot_1 = plot(G, "x^2", range(-3, 3)); P = interpolate(G, plot_1, 0.5)

examples.scenario: Animate point along ellipse for focal distance demo
examples.expression: F1 = point(G, -3, 0); F2 = point(G, 3, 0); ell = ellipse(G, F1, F2, type(foci)); P = interpolate(G, ell, 0, 1)
